text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I placed in the top three...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't sink my teeth into the lead... Even
though I've been sharpening them precisely for
this day.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
There's no point in hunting prey that can't put up
a fight.
choice_data_list:
The tougher they are, the more exciting the
fight!

The tougher they are, the more exciting the
fight!
Let's think about what we need to win!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
There's no point in hunting prey that can't put up
a fight.
choice_data_list:
The tougher they are, the more exciting the
fight!

The tougher they are, the more exciting the
fight!
Let's think about what we need to win!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: One more step. If I can take just one more step...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: All right. I'm definitely going to get it next time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What we need... You mean, something that I'm
currently lacking?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I think I know what it is. You do too, right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Then it's settled. We've just got to focus on it in
training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Let's go. Time to the start the counterattack!
